notes: SEIFA (socio-economic disadvantage) IRSD-decile-to-quintile recode, PROC SORT + merge onto the main cohort keyed on SLA_2011_CODE. The 15 SLA_2011_CODE/IRSD_decile rows are the real first data rows of the repo's own SEIFA_2011SLA.csv, inlined via datalines (the shipped runner uploads script text only, not sibling data files, so the bundle must be self-contained). The original npdc_main cohort (127,673 rows, private linked hospital data) is substituted with a 15-row mock cohort whose SLA codes match the inlined SEIFA rows. Recode thresholds and merge logic unchanged from source.
